name: Almonty Industries Inc.
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$25.8035. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$25.7011 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$25.8035, stop A$21.0573, target A$26.1900. Risk/reward is 0.08:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
